scenario.context: Station 03 of the day flow: Combine labor rights, co-determination and development planning.
scenario.mission: You resolve team conflicts in a structured way and derive a responsible development plan.

customerRequest.subject: Station 03: Conflict communication and learning planning
customerRequest.body: Please handle a team conflict situation with appropriate co-determination and communication logic and derive a concrete learning and development plan.

questions.title: Prepare a conflict factually
questions.prompt: Which steps help when preparing a conflict conversation? (Multiple selection)

options.rationale: Makes the need for action visible.
Without follow-up there is no commitment.

feedback.correct: Correct: this is structured conflict preparation.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please prioritize factual grounding and solution orientation.

questions.title: Appropriate escalation path
questions.prompt: A problem persists despite a team discussion. What is the best next step?

options.text: Pass on a documented status through the designated escalation path
Spread the topic internally without involving responsible parties
Do nothing and hope for chance

feedback.correct: Correct: escalation requires evidence and a clean channel.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: without an orderly path, the chance of resolution drops.

questions.title: From conflict to learning measure
questions.prompt: Order the sequence from problem identification to learning derivation.
items: Document the problem in a structured way
Formulate a learning goal for your role
correctOrder: Document the problem in a structured way
Formulate a learning goal for your role

feedback.correct: Correct: this turns conflict into learning progress.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: document/analyze first, then improve and follow up.

questions.title: Plan a learning window
questions.prompt: You plan 5 learning slots of 40 minutes each plus 35 minutes of reflection. How many minutes does the block cover?

feedback.wrong: Please sum learning slots and reflection time correctly.

questions.title: Development goal after a conflict
questions.prompt: Formulate in 4-6 sentences a development goal derived from a team conflict.
questions.expectedOutline: Conflict cause, concrete learning goal, scheduled follow-up.

feedback.correct: Correct: the goal is clear, actionable and verifiable.
feedback.wrong: Please connect cause, goal and follow-up more concretely.
